A critical component of this role is acting as a hands-on technical expert who designs, develops, and delivers Proof of Concepts (POCs) and hackathons for Data Cloud and Agentforce solutions. This involves transforming architectural visions into tangible, working solutions that demonstrate the power of AI-driven, unified data to our customers. Topics will include AI/Machine Learning architecture, data unification, large-scale data architecture, data modeling, solution performance, and system integration patterns.

Your Impact – Responsibilities:


Support the sales cycle, covering the technical architecture, data strategy, and AI capabilities of Data Cloud and Agentforce.
Design, build, and present hands-on Proof of Concepts (POCs) and demonstrations for Data Cloud and Agentforce, showcasing their power and viability to technical stakeholders.
Explain the technical and business benefits of the Salesforce Customer 360 platform, with a strong focus on Data Cloud and Agentforce, to IT and technical stakeholders.
Understand, assess, and define technical customer requirements, focusing on AI, data management, and operational data utilisation.
Advise CIO/CTO/CXO-level contacts and their IT teams on adopting cloud architectures, particularly how to leverage unified customer data and generative AI effectively.
Answer deep technical questions related to the capabilities and integration of Salesforce Data Cloud, AI, and Agentforce solutions.
Establish close relationships with customer technical stakeholders and act as a trusted advisor on data and AI strategy.
Respond to RFPs, focusing on the technical components of data, AI, and integration.
Coach and mentor fellow pre-sales colleagues on the technical aspects of Data Cloud and Agentforce.
Be a thought leader on specific technology topics like Generative AI and Data Strategy.
Drive innovation projects with impact (POCs, MVPs).
Maintain awareness of technical best practices related to data governance, security, and compliance.


Minimum Qualifications:


Proven track record of running hands-on, successful technical Proof of Concepts (POCs) for complex AI and/or Data solutions.
Relevant background and deep technical expertise in AI, Machine Learning, and/or Advanced Data Solutions (e.g., CDP, Data Warehousing, Data Lake, etc.).
Fluent in English and local language (Bahasa)
Experience in pre-sales, e.g., solution engineering or technical architecture.
Multi-year experience in software, system, or enterprise architecture disciplines.
Strong understanding of data integration patterns, data synchronisation, and data volume considerations in a cloud environment.
Good understanding of the architectural principles of cloud-based platforms, including SaaS, PaaS, multitenancy, and multi-tiered infrastructure.
General interest in staying at the forefront of current technology developments and keeping knowledge up to date.


Preferred Qualifications:


Direct experience with Salesforce Data Cloud, Agentforce, Marketing Cloud, or Service Cloud (Agentforce) solutions.
Experience with Large Language Models (LLMs) and Generative AI architectures.
Salesforce Certified Architect or relevant Data/AI certifications (e.g., AWS, Azure, GCP Data/ML certifications).
Knowledge of relevant data privacy and compliance requirements is a plus.
Knowledge of data architecture principles, including data modeling, ETL/ELT, data governance, and data quality.


Tentang SalesforceSalesforce Adalah CRM AI Terkemuka, Di Mana Manusia Dan Agen Bekerja Sama Untuk Mencapai Kesuksesan Pelanggan. Di Sini, Ambisi Bertemu Dengan Tindakan. Teknologi Bertemu Dengan Kepercayaan. Dan Inovasi Bukan Sekadar Istilah Populer — Itu Adalah Cara Hidup. Dunia Kerja Yang Kita Kenal Sedang Berubah, Dan Kami Mencari Trailblazers Yang Bersemangat Untuk Meningkatkan Bisnis Dan Dunia Melalui AI, Mendorong Inovasi, Dan Menjaga Nilai-nilai Inti Salesforce Di Pusat Segala Hal. Siap Untuk Mengembangkan Karier Anda Di Perusahaan Yang Memimpin Transformasi Tenaga Kerja Di Era Agen? Anda Berada Di Tempat Yang Tepat! Agentforce Adalah Masa Depan AI, Dan Anda Adalah Masa Depan Salesforce. Bersama Dengan Karyawan, Pelanggan, Dan Mitra Kami, Kami Bekerja Untuk Meningkatkan Kondisi Dunia. Komitmen Kami Terhadap Budaya Yang Didorong Oleh Nilai-nilai — Yang Berakar Pada Kepercayaan, Kesuksesan Pelanggan, Inovasi, Dan Kesetaraan — Adalah Alasan Mengapa Kami Secara Konsisten Diakui Sebagai Salah Satu Pemberi Kerja Terkemuka Di Dunia. Insinyur Solusi Datacloud Dan Agentforce Adalah Anggota Kunci Dari Tim Pra-penjualan. Fokus Peran Ini Adalah Menangani Topik Teknis Kompleks Dalam Siklus Penjualan, Khususnya Untuk Solusi Data Cloud Dan Agentforce Kami. Anda Akan Berperan Penting Dalam Membantu Pelanggan Memahami Bagaimana Kemampuan Salesforce Generasi Berikutnya Ini Cocok Dan Terintegrasi Ke Dalam Lanskap Arsitektur Mereka Yang Sudah Ada. Komponen Kritis Dari Peran Ini Adalah Bertindak Sebagai Ahli Teknis Yang Praktis Yang Merancang, Mengembangkan, Dan Mengimplementasikan Proof Of Concepts (POC) Dan Hackathons Untuk Solusi Data Cloud Dan Agentforce. Ini Melibatkan Transformasi Visi Arsitektur Menjadi Solusi Yang Nyata Dan Berfungsi, Yang Menunjukkan Kekuatan Data Terpadu Yang Didorong Oleh AI Kepada Pelanggan Kami. Topik Yang Dibahas Meliputi Arsitektur AI/Machine Learning, Unifikasi Data, Arsitektur Data Skala Besar, Pemodelan Data, Kinerja Solusi, Dan Pola Integrasi Sistem.Dampak Anda – Tanggung Jawab:

Mendukung siklus penjualan dengan membahas arsitektur teknis, strategi data, dan kemampuan AI dari Data Cloud dan Agentforce.

Merancang, membangun, dan mempresentasikan Proof of Concepts (POC) dan demonstrasi praktis untuk Data Cloud dan Agentforce, menampilkan kekuatan dan kelayakannya kepada pemangku kepentingan teknis.

Menjelaskan manfaat teknis dan bisnis platform Salesforce Customer 360, dengan fokus kuat pada Data Cloud dan Agentforce, kepada pemangku kepentingan IT dan teknis.

Memahami, mengevaluasi, dan mendefinisikan persyaratan teknis pelanggan, dengan fokus pada AI, manajemen data, dan pemanfaatan data operasional.

Memberikan saran kepada kontak tingkat CIO/CTO/CXO dan tim IT mereka tentang adopsi arsitektur cloud, terutama cara memanfaatkan data pelanggan terpadu dan AI generatif secara efektif.

Menjawab pertanyaan teknis mendalam terkait kemampuan dan integrasi solusi Salesforce Data Cloud, AI, dan Agentforce.

Membangun hubungan dekat dengan pemangku kepentingan teknis pelanggan dan bertindak sebagai penasihat tepercaya dalam strategi data dan AI.

Menanggapi RFP, dengan fokus pada komponen teknis data, AI, dan integrasi.

Membimbing dan membina rekan kerja pra-penjualan dalam aspek teknis Data Cloud dan Agentforce.

Menjadi pemimpin pemikiran dalam topik teknologi spesifik seperti AI Generatif dan Strategi Data.

Menggerakkan proyek inovasi berdampak (POC, MVP).

Menjaga kesadaran akan praktik terbaik teknis terkait tata kelola data, keamanan, dan kepatuhan.

Persyaratan Minimum:

Rekam jejak yang terbukti dalam mengelola Proof of Concepts (POC) teknis yang sukses untuk solusi AI dan/atau data yang kompleks.

Latar belakang relevan dan keahlian teknis mendalam dalam AI, Machine Learning, dan/atau Solusi Data Lanjutan (misalnya CDP, Data Warehousing, Data Lake, dll.).

Menguasai bahasa Inggris dan bahasa lokal (Bahasa).

Pengalaman dalam pra-penjualan, misalnya rekayasa solusi atau arsitektur teknis.

Pengalaman bertahun-tahun dalam disiplin arsitektur perangkat lunak, sistem, atau arsitektur perusahaan.

Pemahaman yang baik tentang prinsip arsitektur platform berbasis cloud, termasuk SaaS, PaaS, multitenancy, dan infrastruktur berlapis.

Minat umum untuk tetap berada di garis depan perkembangan teknologi terkini dan memperbarui pengetahuan.

Kualifikasi Yang Diutamakan:

Pengetahuan tentang prinsip arsitektur data, termasuk pemodelan data, ETL/ELT, tata kelola data, dan kualitas data.

title: Lead Full-Stack Engineer
job_description:
About the job

oin the team redefining the future of global living.

At The Flex, we believe renting a home should feel instant, intelligent, and effortless — as seamless as booking a ride.

Our ambition is bold: enabling anyone to live anywhere, anytime, without friction.

Powered by Base360.ai, our proprietary automation engine, we’re building the operating system for modern renting — connecting property data, orchestrating operations, and enabling seamless stays across continents.

If you’re driven by technical ownership, system architecture, and building platforms that operate at real-world scale, this role puts you at the center of how millions of people move, live, and experience the world.

💡 What You’ll Build

As a Lead Full-Stack Engineer, you will own the architecture and technical direction of The Flex platform — spanning web applications, APIs, automation engines, and cloud infrastructure.

You’ll lead by building.

You’ll design systems, set standards, and make key technical decisions while remaining deeply hands-on across the stack.

This is not a people-management role.

It’s a technical leadership role for someone who wants to shape systems, mentor by example, and build platforms that scale globally.

⚙️ Your Mission

Own the Architecture

Define and evolve the technical architecture powering bookings, payments, availability, pricing, and guest experience.

Lead by Building

Deliver critical features end-to-end across frontend, backend, and infrastructure — setting the bar for quality and speed.

Design API-First Platforms

Architect scalable, well-structured APIs that connect Base360.ai to internal tools and external partners.

Automate the Business

Build event-driven services and intelligent workflows that replace manual operations across the company.

Integrate at Scale

Own and evolve deep integrations with platforms such as Airbnb, Stripe, Hostaway, and Twilio.

Ship with Confidence

Deploy and operate serverless infrastructure on AWS, ensuring reliability, security, and global performance.

Solve the Hard Stuff

Lead solutions for real-time booking sync, pricing intelligence, keyless access logic, AI-powered alerts, and live operational dashboards.

Raise the Bar

Establish best practices, review critical code, and mentor engineers through example and technical clarity.

🧠 You’re a Great Fit If You Have


Strong senior-level experience with FastAPI, React, and AWS 
Proven ownership of system architecture and complex distributed systems
Deep experience designing and scaling API-first platforms
A history of building production-grade systems used at real scale
High standards for code quality, reliability, and performance
A builder’s mindset — you execute fast, think long-term, and enjoy responsibility


🌍 Why You’ll Love Working Here

Architect Real Impact

Your decisions will shape a platform used across cities and continents.

High Ownership, No Politics

Small, elite team with real autonomy and zero corporate drag.

Build From First Principles

You’ll help define not just features, but the foundation of the company’s technology.

Performance-Based Rewards

Top-of-market compensation with meaningful upside for exceptional leaders.

Remote-First

Work from anywhere — we care about leverage and outcomes, not hours.

🚫 This Role Is Not for You If


You want a management-heavy role with little hands-on work
You avoid making hard technical decisions
You’re uncomfortable owning systems end-to-end
“Good enough” is acceptable to you

title: Full Stack Engineer
job_description:
About the job

Remote - Worldwide

Lead Full-Stack Engineer(React/Node - Japanese Speaker)




About Andela

Andela exists to connect brilliance and opportunity. Since 2014, we have been dedicated to breaking down global barriers and accelerating the future of work for both technologists and organizations around the world. For technologists, Andela offers competitive long-term career opportunities with leading organizations, access to a global community of professionals, and educational opportunities with leading technology providers.

After applying for this role, you will join our Andela Community of brilliant technologists by passing a technical screening and live interview. As a community member, you’ll have access to many exclusive technologist roles. Join Andela today to access this opportunity and more in our global marketplace!







Our roles are typically filled at lightning speed, so if you’re considering applying, get your application in quickly!







About

We are looking for a Lead-Level Full-Stack Engineer to help build and scale our internal workflow automation platform built on top of n8n.

This role will play a critical part in driving adoption among our Japan pilot users, particularly within the Recruit domain.

They will combine strong technical leadership with hands-on engineering, while closely partnering with stakeholders in Japan to ensure successful onboarding, customization, and long-term platform success.

n8n is an open‑source workflow automation tool:

It lets you connect different apps and services (APIs, databases, webhooks, etc.) and build automated workflows using a visual editor.
You create flows as diagrams made of nodes (e.g., “When a form is submitted → Create a record in a database → Send a Slack message”).
It supports conditional logic, loops, data transformations, and custom code, so it’s more flexible than many no‑code tools.
You can run it self‑hosted (Docker, server, etc.) or use n8n Cloud.







Key Responsibilities:

Build and scale our internal workflow automation platform built on top of n8n.




Must-Have Skills:

Backend (Primary Focus)

Node.js – Primary backend programming language.
n8n Automation - building, extending, and operating an internal workflow automation platform based on n8n.
Python – Secondary language used for services, scripting, or supporting backend components.

Frontend:

React – Some Knowledge & Experience building modern, responsive web interfaces and integrating with backend services.

Databases:

PostgreSQL – Relational database design and querying.
MongoDB – NoSQL data modeling and document-based storage.







Additional Experience:

SaaS integrations.
Strong systems and API integration experience, including working with internal services, third-party platforms, and building scalable data/service integrations.
RestAPI.
Docker.




Language Requirement:

Business-level to native Japanese proficiency required.
Ability to communicate effectively with stakeholders and users in Japan




Soft Skills:

Customer relationship management skills as part of the desired profile. The candidate should be comfortable working directly with stakeholders, building strong relationships, and supporting users or customers to ensure successful adoption and ongoing collaboration.




Nice to Have:

SaaS integrations.
Workflow automation design.
Platform architecture.




TIMEZONE COVERAGE:

(GMT+9) Japan Tokyo or APAC (IST)

title: Ruby Engineer

About the job

As an hourly paid, fully remote Ruby Engineer for AI Data Training, you will review AI-generated Ruby and Rails code or generate your own solutions, evaluate the reasoning quality and step-by-step problem-solving, and provide expert feedback that helps models produce answers that are accurate, logical, and clearly explained. This role is with SME Careers, a fast-growing AI Data Services company and subsidiary of SuperAnnotate that provides AI training data for many of the world’s largest AI companies and foundation model labs, and your work will directly help improve the world’s premier AI models while giving you the flexibility of impactful, detail-oriented remote contract work.

Key Responsibilities

title: Partner Solutions Engineer
job_description:
About the job

The ASEAN Systems Engineering team includes over 90 skilled, collaborative, and forward-thinking engineers. You are a customer-obsessed, solution-oriented technical sales engineer who thrives in collaborative environments. You can navigate between business and technical conversations, influencing internal and external stakeholders effectively.

Experience engaging and enabling Partners in both technical and strategic conversations.

A proactive, high-ownership mindset—you take initiative, solve problems, and "go the extra mile."
Strong communication skills—verbal and written—tailored for technical and executive-level audiences.
Ability to translate customer business needs into technical solutions with clear justifications.
Continuous learning attitude, with active participation in virtual teams, architecture groups, and community forums.


Why Cisco?

At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.

Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.

We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

title: Senior QA Automation Engineer
job_description:
About the job

At Bjak, we're on a mission to provide access to affordable and sustainable financial services for people in ASEAN. Headquartered in Malaysia, Bjak is the largest insurance portal in Southeast Asia. Our main portal, Bjak.com, assists millions in finding the best value and highest coverage insurance policies. Perform root cause analysis of failures and collaborate directly with development and product teams to resolve defects and ensure quality metrics are met.

Document test plans, test cases, automation design decisions, and contribute to the continuous improvement of overall QA processes and best practices.

title: Lead Full-Stack Engineer
job_description:
About the job

oin the team redefining the future of global living.

At The Flex, we believe renting a home should feel instant, intelligent, and effortless — as seamless as booking a ride.

Our ambition is bold: enabling anyone to live anywhere, anytime, without friction.

Powered by Base360.ai, our proprietary automation engine, we’re building the operating system for modern renting — connecting property data, orchestrating operations, and enabling seamless stays across continents.

If you’re driven by technical ownership, system architecture, and building platforms that operate at real-world scale, this role puts you at the center of how millions of people move, live, and experience the world.

💡 What You’ll Build

As a Lead Full-Stack Engineer, you will own the architecture and technical direction of The Flex platform — spanning web applications, APIs, automation engines, and cloud infrastructure.

You’ll lead by building.

You’ll design systems, set standards, and make key technical decisions while remaining deeply hands-on across the stack.

This is not a people-management role.

It’s a technical leadership role for someone who wants to shape systems, mentor by example, and build platforms that scale globally.

⚙️ Your Mission

Own the Architecture

Define and evolve the technical architecture powering bookings, payments, availability, pricing, and guest experience.

Lead by Building

Deliver critical features end-to-end across frontend, backend, and infrastructure — setting the bar for quality and speed.

Design API-First Platforms

Architect scalable, well-structured APIs that connect Base360.ai to internal tools and external partners.

Automate the Business

Build event-driven services and intelligent workflows that replace manual operations across the company.

Integrate at Scale

Own and evolve deep integrations with platforms such as Airbnb, Stripe, Hostaway, and Twilio.

Ship with Confidence

Deploy and operate serverless infrastructure on AWS, ensuring reliability, security, and global performance.

Solve the Hard Stuff

Lead solutions for real-time booking sync, pricing intelligence, keyless access logic, AI-powered alerts, and live operational dashboards.

Raise the Bar

Establish best practices, review critical code, and mentor engineers through example and technical clarity.

🧠 You’re a Great Fit If You Have


Strong senior-level experience with FastAPI, React, and AWS 
Proven ownership of system architecture and complex distributed systems
Deep experience designing and scaling API-first platforms
A history of building production-grade systems used at real scale
High standards for code quality, reliability, and performance
A builder’s mindset — you execute fast, think long-term, and enjoy responsibility


🌍 Why You’ll Love Working Here

Architect Real Impact

Your decisions will shape a platform used across cities and continents.

High Ownership, No Politics

Small, elite team with real autonomy and zero corporate drag.

Build From First Principles

You’ll help define not just features, but the foundation of the company’s technology.

Performance-Based Rewards

Top-of-market compensation with meaningful upside for exceptional leaders.

Remote-First

Work from anywhere — we care about leverage and outcomes, not hours.

🚫 This Role Is Not for You If


You want a management-heavy role with little hands-on work
You avoid making hard technical decisions
You’re uncomfortable owning systems end-to-end
“Good enough” is acceptable to you
